_doc: Override mapiranje neuredne izvedene linije na kanonsku (playbook §4b). Ključ: "<Brend>::<raw line>" -> "<kanonska linija>". Dijeljeno; širi se po potrebi. Izvori netrivijalnih mapiranja u _log.

_log.5 Vegas::*: Sumatra wrapper + Churchill/Corona/Double Corona/Robusto/Torpedo = 5 Vegas Classic (cigarsinternational.com/p/5-vegas-classic-cigars)
_log.Ashton::Churchill|Corona|Panetela: CT Shade Dominican = Ashton Classic vitolas (ashtoncigar.com/cigars/ashton/ashton); A2: Corona duplicira kurirani Classic/Corona
_log.Angry Elf::*: Candela wrapper = original Angry Elf / Candela line; Connecticut/Maduro/Sun Grown već imenovani (holts.com/cigars/all-cigar-brands/angry-elf)
_log.Asylum 13::*: Nicaraguan Habano original Asylum 13 (bez podimena); Connecticut/Insidious Short već imenovani (famous-smoke.com/brand-asylum-13)
_log.Avo::Piramide|Robusto: Ecuador CT = Avo Classic (jr cigars / oxfordcigarcompany Avo Classic Piramides & Robusto)
_log.Baccarat::*: CT Shade Honduras sweet-cap = Baccarat The Game (Camacho/Davidoff); Maduro/Nicaragua već imenovani
_log.Brick House::Robusto|Toro: Ecuador Habano = Brick House Classic (jcnewman.com/company/brick-house-cigars); market Classic već postoji → merge
_log.Don Diego::Robusto: CT Shade Dominican = Don Diego Classic (altadisusa.com/cigars/don-diego)
_log.Flor de las Antillas::*: Nicaraguan sun-grown Habano original (ne Maduro); myfathercigars.com/cigar/flor-de-las-antillas — kanonski naziv = brand
_log.Four Kicks::Robusto: Ecuador Habano original Four Kicks (neptunecigar.com/cigars/crowned-heads-four-kicks-robusto) — linija = brand
_log.Onyx Reserve::*: CT Broadleaf maduro = Onyx Reserve core (altadisusa.com/cigars/onyx/onyx-reserve) — linija = brand
_log.Quorum::*: Ecuador Sumatra = Quorum Classic (jcnewman.com/company/quorum-cigars); market Classic već postoji → merge
_log.Santa Damiana::*: Connecticut Dominican = Santa Damiana Classic (EU retail: cigarmaxx.de / cigarquery Classic series)
_log.The Tabernacle::Robusto|Toro: CT Broadleaf = The Tabernacle CT Broadleaf (foundationcigarcompany.com/the-tabernacle-ct-broadleaf); Havana Seed CT 142 već imenovan
_log.Warlock::*: Ecuador Habano single-line brand (holts.com/cigars/all-cigar-brands/warlock) — linija = brand
_log.La Aurora::107 Nicaragua: A2: market linija duplicira kuriranu vitolu/liniju 107 / 107 Nicaragua
_log.skipped: Preskočeno (dvosmisleno/multi-line bez pouzdanog matcha): Argyle, Asylum (bez 13), Arturo Fuente Piramide, Bella Cuba, Blenders Clearing House, Domenico, Don Lino, Griffin's, Henry Clay, La Aroma de Cuba bare (Broadleaf vs Mi Amor/San Andrés rizik), La Gloria Cubana, Montesino (Natural+Maduro agregacija), Old Henry, Padrón Churchill/Panetela, Por Larranaga, Samana, Savoy, Vallejuelo, te jednovitolni/nepoznati jednolinijski brendovi bez potvrđenog imena linije

batch2.El Baton::*: JC Newman Habano core (jcnewman.com / cigardojo El Baton); Double već imenovan
batch2.La Antiguedad::*: My Father brand=line (myfathercigars.com/cigar/la-antiguedad); Super već imenovan
batch2.Samana::*: US CT Shade Classic Line (zigarren-gentlemans.ch Samana Classic Line)
batch2.La Aroma de Cuba bare Broadleaf: core LADC CT Broadleaf (holts.com / cigartrader La Aroma de Cuba); Mi Amor/Connecticut već imenovani
batch2.Vallejuelo::*: Habano Classic → merge na postojeći market Clasic (intercigar.com/vallejuelo)
batch2.Bella Cuba Sumatra: original Sumatra; Candela/Connecticut/Maduro već imenovani (holts Bella Cuba)
batch2.Old Henry Habano: core Habano; Gold Label/Maduro/Pure Breed/Fumadores već imenovani
batch2.Argyle CT bare: CT Shade → Connecticut (merge s postojećom Argyle::Connecticut)

batch3.only_bare_brand_as_line: Jednolinijski brendovi (samo bare vitole, konzistentan wrapper): Amante, Apr, Belleza, Blarney Stone, Bohekio, Bottom Shelf, Botucal, Casa Royale, Castano, Cortesia, Don Melo, Don Rubio, El Sitio, Escarabin, Flor de Jose, Gaia, Jalopy, La Capitana, La Coalicion, La Duena, La Libertad, Los Amigos, Lucky Dublin, Luminosa, Notorious, Rainmaker, Royal Symbols, Utopia → brand-as-line
batch3.Graycliff Original::Presidente: Sumatra bare → Graycliff Original (Pirate ostaje zasebna linija)
batch3.skipped: Confidenciaal (wrapper unbekannt/geheim); La Sirena (wrapper —); Excalibur Epicure (CT Shade+Broadleaf dual); Asylum bare (multi-line Habano/H-2000 mix); Arturo Fuente Piramide; Blenders Clearing House (CT+Habano agregacija + Maduro); Bribon; Domenico (miješani wrapperi); Don Lino bare; El Centurion Gran Toro vs H-2K-CT; El Credito; Hemmys; Henry Clay Toro vs War Hawk/Stalk Cut; Kaneda; La Gloria Cubana (Natural+Maduro agregacija); La Ley; Montesino (Natural+Maduro); Padrón Churchill/Panetela; Peterson Hallmark; Por Larranaga CT non-Cuban; Prominent; 7-20-4 Robusto (multi-line)
